description_short: Meridian Ops is an incident management platform that assembles responders, opens a Slack channel, and drafts status updates automatically when an alert fires.
description_long:
Meridian Ops automates the mechanics of incident response: when an alert fires it assembles responders, opens a Slack channel, pulls in the relevant runbook, and drafts the status-page update. It integrates with PagerDuty and Opsgenie for paging and captures the incident timeline automatically.

After the incident, it generates a draft postmortem with contributing factors and action items that sync to Jira. The company says more than 2,000 engineering teams use it; it was founded in 2020 and is remote-first with a hub office in Austin, TX.
